name: SOLITARIO RESOURCES CORP.
summary: Solitario Resources Corp. is a mineral exploration company incorporated in Colorado in 1984, focused on acquiring and exploring precious metal, zinc, and base metal properties. Its core assets include the Florida Canyon zinc project in Peru (39% interest, carried by Nexa), the Lik zinc-lead-silver project in Alaska (50% with Teck), and the Golden Crest gold project in South Dakota (100%). The company also holds the Cat Creek and Bright Angel projects in Colorado and the Chambara project in Peru.
